key_insights.insight: Modern life with its distractions and stress significantly impacts sexual desire and response.
key_insights.quote: Being able to pay attention to what's happening in your body or being able to pay attention to We're getting more and more in pursuit of distraction.

key_insights.insight: Desire in long-term relationships shifts from spontaneous to responsive, requiring intentional triggering through sexual stimuli.
key_insights.quote: Responsive desire is desire that emerges out of us beginning sexual activity or having what we call sexual stimuli in front of us.

key_insights.insight: Focus on increasing 'sexual currency' – actions marking a couple as sexual beings, apart from sex itself – to enhance desire and satisfaction.
key_insights.quote: Sexual currency, my definition of it would be it's everything that you do that marks you out as a sexual couple apart from having sex

key_insights.insight: Open communication is critical for navigating the evolving nature of sex and relationships, including discussing fantasies, desires, and discomfort.
key_insights.quote: We know that being able to talk about sex is one of the most highly correlated factors with long-term sexual satisfaction and relationship satisfaction and maintaining desire over time.

key_insights.insight: Pressure and expectations are passion killers in the bedroom, creating tension that inhibits arousal and pleasure.
key_insights.quote: Pressure is not good for our sex lives.

key_insights.insight: Women's least favorite sexual act is penis and vagina sex, making it important to prioritize clitoral stimulation and oral sex.
key_insights.quote: We also know that penis and vagina sex is women's least favorite sexual act.

key_insights.insight: When men experience erection challenges, both partners need to understand it doesn't necessarily mean a lack of desire or attraction; communication and focusing on other forms of intimacy are key.
key_insights.quote: No erection doesn't mean that you don't want to have sex it might sometimes of course but if you're saying look i'm i'm really keen for this. I'm just not there yet. Then theyneed to take that at face value.

key_insights.insight: Sex doesn't always mean vaginal penetration or orgasm. It encompasses the state of being sexual with another person.
key_insights.quote: They were sexual together so what happens with these sexual scripts is that they benefit us to some degree

actionable_advice.advice: Schedule physical intimacy, not necessarily sex, to trigger responsive desire.
actionable_advice.how_to: Plan regular activities involving physical touch, like cuddling, massage, or taking a bath together, without the explicit expectation of sex.

actionable_advice.advice: Start conversations about sex by discussing external sources (podcasts, movies) before talking about your own relationship.
actionable_advice.how_to: Bring up interesting facts or discussions from media about sex and pleasure to gauge your partner's interest and open the door to discussing your own desires.

actionable_advice.advice: Increase 'sexual currency' through small, non-sexual acts of intimacy and flirtation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Passionate kisses, flirtatious texts, compliments, and physical affection outside of the bedroom create a constant current of sexual energy.

actionable_advice.advice: If you're a parent, focus on dividing household labor equitably.
actionable_advice.how_to: Discuss and fairly allocate household tasks to avoid resentment and the feeling of one partner being more of a caregiver than a lover.

actionable_advice.advice: If you're experiencing erection problems, communicate that you still desire intimacy and suggest focusing on other types of sexual activity.
actionable_advice.how_to: Initiate intimacy, but clearly communicate that you would like to focus on other sexual acts.

memorable_stories: A couple uses a 10-second passionate kiss in an elevator as a form of sexual currency.
The host describes being stressed and unable to get aroused despite wanting to be intimate.
The guest's description of being told by her supervisor that she was not cut out to be a psychologist and glad to have proven her wrong.
contrarian_claims: Waiting to 'feel like' having sex is a flawed approach, especially for women in long-term relationships.
The amount of sex couples have is not correlated with their satisfaction.
Monogamy isn't natural and requires work.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Orgasm Expert: Women Don’t Like Penetrative Sex As Much As Men! This Is How Often You Should Be Having Sex! Stop Inviting Pets Into The Bedroom! - Doctor Karen Gurney
